name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Team, become a founding member to help more women fight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We have 10 Democratic women running for re-election this cycle, including me. That's nearly half of ALL women in the Senate.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170719-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Team,

We have 10 Democratic women running for re-election this cycle, including me. That's nearly half of ALL women in the Senate.

Think for a moment what the Senate would look like if we can't help all of our female senators launch strong campaigns.

I sure remember my experience running for the Senate as a first-time candidate. I had to quickly learn everything it took to talk to voters across the state, raise money, sign up hundreds of volunteers, and stand up to a Republican incumbent with $10 million in the bank.

There were many steps embarking on that campaign trail. And I absolutely couldn't have taken each and every one without strong grassroots support.

So when the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee told me they wanted a strong launch of the Women's Senate Network for the 2018 cycle, to help women run and make sure more voices like mine and Kamala's and Maggie's are in the Senate -- I had to tell you what I immediately told them:

**I 'm all in.**

[**Today, I 'm asking you to join me in becoming a 2018 founding donor of the DSCC Women's Senate Network. Because you've been with us in the past, I'm hoping you'll pitch in and help us build a community to support women who run for office.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170719-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Now let me be honest and upfront: 2018 is going to be a challenging year for Democrats. Ahead are a lot of tight races to protect our seats, including 10 women running for reelection to the Senate -- more than ever before.

That's why the DSCC's Women's Senate Network is ramping up its 2018 efforts to elect smart, tough, and experienced candidates to fight for what's right -- who understand that women are not pre-existing conditions, that we deserve equal pay, and we sure as heck need Planned Parenthood and affordable health care for hardworking families.

So if you're proud of the women in the Senate who are fighting those fights, let's continue that momentum to break barriers and grow women's ranks in leadership.

[**I 'm counting on you to keep fighting for what we all started: Become a 2018 founding donor of the DSCC Women's Senate Network today. And with a gift of $7 or more, you'll even get your very own "Nevertheless, She Persisted" magnet when you become a member!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170719-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Every minute counts to get a campaign off the ground. It mattered the most when the DSCC helped launched my Senate campaign, and when they were there to help Catherine Cortez Masto and Tammy Duckworth launch their successful 2016 campaigns.

And with your help, they'll be there for the next generation of female candidates right at the beginning.

Thank you for owning a piece of this. Women Senate candidates across the country are going to see how excited we are for them to run.

Senator Elizabeth Warren

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbe6/2b07114c/3283933f/73111230/248214003/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbe6/2b07114c/3283933f/73111233/248214003/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbe6/2b07114c/3283933f/73111232/248214003/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: The White House
subject: A Message From The President
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=021c22011d82e40924e471bd4839f813562ac161a757fd5c2110423b18eb1dc282450917ad766a4968a02bfbac316dca906888d3eb7b10f6

A Message From The President

Yesterday, I met with Republican Senators at the White House and told them that now is the time for action. Obamacare was a big lie. “You can keep your doctor”—lie. “You can keep your plan”—lie. Now, people are hurting, and inaction is not an option. We must repeal and replace this disaster. The Senate should not leave for summer recess until it has passed a plan to give our people great healthcare. I’m ready to act; I have pen in hand. I’ll sign the legislation into law, and then we can celebrate for the American people.

- President Donald J. Trump

-------------

President Trump Hosts Made in America Roundtable with American Companies
Yesterday, President Trump hosted a Made in America Roundtable with 20 American companies and 4 members of Congress. The discussions were focused on the importance of manufacturing products in American factories with American workers.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=021c22011d82e409bcb861545c3372375d3e259cfc0a73fcd8cd3b580f2f4003d5e18894a6e44bb6bf339d5dcb50eaacf130dcbd4284c635
Read More
President Trump Discusses Healthcare Plan with Members of Congress
President Trump hosted a lunch with members of Congress to discuss the problems with healthcare and to urge not only the repeal, but also the replacement of the disaster known as Obamacare. President Trump's new plan for healthcare will substantially lower premiums, repeal burdensome taxes, expand coverage options, protect preexisting condition coverage, improve medical outcomes for low income Americans, and redirect authority from Washington D.C. to the states so they can innovate and develop the best practices for the American people.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=021c22011d82e4095258e8f7bb77b55db711e1446ce830c694705198764d8c83f9473a66781234f640e739f653c55118b928f8d231671fee
Watch the Discussion
Vice President Pence Leads First Meeting of the Presidential Advisory Commission on Election Integrity
Yesterday, Vice President Pence was joined by several elected officials at the first meeting of the Presidential Advisory Commission on Election Integrity, which is designed to explore and fix vulnerabilities in the voting process to ensure the integrity of our system.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=021c22011d82e40911c50b897150ab03692dd2a789d8db0fb7dc9746824ff58c1926bfb7ff2fc186c81fdf1867cae15f45bdf99546875433
Watch the Video

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and Vice President Mike Pence

| July 19, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

POTUS and VP TODAY

Today, President Trump and Vice President Pence will be making an announcement at the White House regarding a Pharmaceutical Glass Packaging Initiative.

Coming Up this week

Tomorrow, President Trump will welcome the survivors of the USS Arizona to the White House. On Saturday, President Trump will travel to Norfolk, Virginia, to attend the commissioning of the USS Gerald R. Ford.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=021c22011d82e40982c0bff3bd2cd0d5ab5c2c03465558f71dbe0dbca73948a1bbf3be344de6e5b54cf292607a29f6fd4c9e18ff107435d6
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=021c22011d82e4099897fe4a4f73015bf4f1da4c0df887d7efcf1cd2b3566f1a19b32d7c0b834e113f91f78471f28ca030235f8ac2797b79
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d433779e01c1809b4662266bd1b8609006784ab065cbf0dae84c6101a81abe6b9e5ae836fac69c31d85c2b1b8bc2833e7a
Unsubscribe

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest: Health Care
body:
Before we get to the update on Gov. Kasich's recent activities,
we wanted to take a moment to ask you to join us in saying a
prayer for Sen. John McCain and his family with his recent cancer
diagnosis.

Peter, before we get to the
update on Gov. Kasich's recent activities, we wanted to take a
moment to ask you to join us in saying a prayer for Sen. John
McCain and his family with his recent cancer diagnosis. He truly
is an American hero and we wish him a speedy recovery.

The Latest: Health Care

Gov. John Kasich has long been
calling for a bipartisan solution to repeal and replace Obamacare
with legislation that will have a lasting and positive impact on
the lives of millions of Americans.

Earlier this week, Gov. Kasich
joined ten other governors, both Republican and Democrat, in
calling for a bipartisan solution to fix Obamacare. View their
letter here.

In case you missed the governor's
recent op-ed or news interviews, please review the links below:

• New York Times: The Way
Forward on Health Care

CNN - The Lead w/ Jake Tapper
July 18, 2017

CNN - Anderson Cooper
July 18, 2017

MSNBC - Morning Joe
July 19, 2017

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!

-Team Kasich

P.S. If you'd like to make a
generous contribution to help us continue to get this message
out, you can chip in (here).

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/is86lmAEN9

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/os86lmAEN9

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Did you think Mitch McConnell would just move on, Derek?
body:
Stand with Democrats to protect affordable health care.
---
**Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are still trying to repeal the Affordable Care Act and throw millions off their insurance. Add your name -- tell Senate Republicans to vote NO on repeal:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170720_ke_nd&source=em_20170720_ke_nd")**

Derek, Trump and the Republicans in Congress are sinking to an all-time low.

When Mitch McConnell learned he didn't have the votes to repeal the Affordable Care Act and replace it with a bad bill that almost no Americans wanted to pass, did he accept the will of the people and move on?

No! Instead, he regrouped and is now planning to vote next Tuesday for a repeal bill that would still throw 22 million people off their insurance, slash Medicaid, and increase out-of-pocket costs.

Here's the reality: Trump, Pence, and the GOP leadership in Congress are hell-bent on repealing Obamacare, no matter the cost. The hardworking Americans who will lose access to the care they desperately need are just collateral damage in their quest to score a political victory.

Derek, this has to stop -- millions of lives are hanging in the balance.

**Add your name to show Senate Republicans where you stand: NO REPEAL.**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170720_ke_nd&source=em_20170720_ke_nd")**
Thanks,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523149/4067b0a/30c11f2de/7e6d544c/4210164624/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170720_ke_nd&source=em_20170720_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523149/4067b0a/30c11f2de/7e6d544d/4210164624/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170720_ke_nd&source=em_20170720_ke_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523149/4067b0a/30c11f2de/7e6d544a/4210164624/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170720_ke_nd&source=em_20170720_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523149/4067b0a/30c11f2de/7e6d544b/4210164624/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170720_ke_nd&source=em_20170720_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

When Mitch McConnell learned he didn't have the votes to repeal the Affordable Care Act and replace it with a bad bill that almost no Americans wanted to pass, did he accept the will of the people and move on? No! Instead, he regrouped and is now planning to vote next Tuesday for a repeal bill that would still throw 22 million people off their insurance, slash Medicaid, and increase out-of-pocket costs. Here's the reality: Trump, Pence, and the GOP leadership in Congress are hell-bent on repealing Obamacare, no matter the cost. The hardworking Americans who will lose access to the care they desperately need are just collateral damage in their quest to score a political victory. name: Kyle Machado, Director of Organizing
subject: Things are heating up - Join the Summer for Progress!
body:
our most ambitious campaign yet--the Summer for Progress.
#
Friends,

Summer is heating up at Our Revolution! We have been working hard to launch our most ambitious campaign yet--the Summer for Progress. We'll be pushing Democrats in Congress to support Medicare for All, 100% renewable energy, ending private prisons and more. We're mobilizing to ensure every Democrat in Congress supports core progressive tenets.
Members of Congress and the Democratic Party need to know that earning progressive support means putting **_people over profit_**. This is non-negotiable!
We're asking them to co-sponsor eight bills that make up the **#PeoplesPlatform**. [**Click here to join as a citizen co-sponsor of legislation that would begin the work of transforming our communities.**](https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/s4p?source=ORem170719-full "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/s4p?source=ORem170719-full")
We'll begin by delivering the petitions to the DNC offices in D.C. on July 25. After the petitions are delivered we'll begin the real work of this project--getting a majority of Democratic members of Congress to co-sponsor all eight of these bills.
When representatives return to their districts, we'll be bringing these issues to their door step. We'll offer lobbying trainings for local groups to organize around their members of Congress, connecting with representatives at town halls, through in-person meetings, and with petition deliveries. We'll also take to social media, make calls to representatives--we won't let up until we're sure everyone knows, **unequivocally** , where Democratic members of Congress stand on the #PeoplesPlatform.
**We need you to join the chorus of voices calling on Congress to support these key progressive bills.[Click the graphic to join as a citizen co-sponsor now, and after signing, please share on social media!](https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/s4p?source=ORem170719-full "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/s4p?source=ORem170719-full")**
[](https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/s4p?source=ORem170719-full "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/s4p?source=ORem170719-full")
In solidarity,
Kyle Machado
Our Revolution
Director of Organizing
**P.S. To learn more about each of the eight bills in the #PeoplesPlatform visit our website at www.SummerforProgress.org.**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

We need you to join the chorus of voices calling on Congress to support these key progressive bills. "" "" In solidarity, Kyle Machado Our Revolution Director of Organizing P.S. To learn more about each of the eight bills in the #PeoplesPlatform visit our website at www.SummerforProgress.org. PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. 603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: the GOP's next move
body:
Help us save affordable care.
---
**Add your name if you're still committed to fighting back against the GOP's health care repeal.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170720_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170720_joc_v2s2")**
Derek --

You marched, you called, you protested, you spoke up, you signed petitions, you made sure Republicans knew that if they voted for the GOP's health care bill, we'd vote them out of office. And it worked. Mitch McConnell couldn't get the votes for his truly dangerous bill.

So pat yourself on the back -- and then get ready to get right back in the fight, because Republicans are making their next move.

McConnell just set a date for the next health care vote -- on Tuesday. And we just learned that the repeal bill they'll be voting on is no different from the last version! It would still cause 22 million Americans to lose the health coverage they rely on.

Clearly, Republicans are grasping at straws. But they want to score political points with their far-right base by saying they voted to repeal Obamacare, even if it comes at the expense of millions of American lives.

**I need you to sign on now and tell the GOP to keep their hands off our health care. They won't give up, so neither can we:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/No-Repeal?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170720_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170720_joc_v2s2")**
We're the last line of defense. Thanks for stepping up.

Jess

Jess O'Connell
Chief Executive Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523143/4067b0a/30c04c46b/7e6d42c0/3259522605/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170720_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170720_joc_v2s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523143/4067b0a/30c04c46b/7e6d42c1/3259522605/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170720_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170720_joc_v2s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523143/4067b0a/30c04c46b/7e6d42ce/3259522605/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170720_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170720_joc_v2s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523143/4067b0a/30c04c46b/7e6d42cf/3259522605/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170720_joc_v2s2&source=em_20170720_joc_v2s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: Let us give it to you straight, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2763/7377f838/371e3b1b/51fb3240/1187411472/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Sometimes, you have to talk straight, Peter.

We've still got a long way to go before we get our country going in the right direction again.

The GOP tried to push a repeal of the Affordable Care Act through Congress with no transparency, Education Secretary Betsy DeVos is trying to turn our public education system into a private enterprise, and the special interests that run Washington want to cut taxes for multinational corporations while balancing our budget on the backs of the middle class. **But Joe is fighting back every step of the way. And as the hardest working person in the Senate, there 's no one better equipped to fight for Indiana.**

**[Chip in $5 to help Joe keep fighting for Hoosiers in the Senate>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2763/7377f838/371e3b1b/51fb3243/1187411472/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-grassroots?20170720nd&amount=10")**

In times like these, there's nothing more valuable than having a fighter like Joe on our side -- that's why we need a grassroots network to stand with him, just like he's been standing up for us in the Senate. We're getting close to 13,500 grassroots donors this year. **[Can you pitch in $5 and make sure Indiana keeps a champion like Joe in the Senate?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2763/7377f838/371e3b1b/51fb3243/1187411472/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-grassroots?20170720nd&amount=10")**

Thanks for standing with us.

\-- Donnelly for Indiana

P.S. -- Dark money special interest groups and their deep-pocketed Republican allies are already attacking Joe with ad buys. **[Can you chip in $5 to help him fight back against the Republican onslaught?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2763/7377f838/371e3b1b/51fb3243/1187411472/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-grassroots?20170720nd&amount=10")** ** ** | **[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2763/7377f838/371e3b1b/51fb3243/1187411472/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-grassroots?20170720nd&amount=10")**
---
** **

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206

name: mindy@dscc.org
subject: Nearly half of all women in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Senator Warren hit the nail on the head yesterday: With only 21 women serving in the Senate, we have to make sure that we're there for the TEN democratic women up for re-election this cycle.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170720-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Team,

Senator Warren hit the nail on the head yesterday:

**With only 21 women serving in the Senate, we have to make sure that we 're there for the TEN Democratic women up for re-election this cycle.**

That's why we're launching the 2018 Women's Senate Network. With your help, we'll be able to give our female Democratic senators the resources they need for the tough fights ahead -- and send them some reinforcements too!

[**Can we count on you to become a founding member of the Women 's Senate Network today? With a gift of $7 or more, we'll send you a "Nevertheless, She Persisted" magnet to thank you for standing with our Democratic women.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170720-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

We're grateful to say that Senator Catherine Cortez Masto -- who delivered a real blow to the GOP last November -- has agreed to take the helm of the 2018 Women's Senate Network to help our candidates launch strong campaigns.

And as Senator Warren's former campaign manager, I can tell you this: Never underestimate the amount of resources you need to win -- or the uniquely vicious attacks that will be thrown at our tough, female candidates.

By signing on to be a part of the Women's Senate Network, you'll be helping us re-elect women like:

* Elizabeth Warren, who hasn't stopped fighting the Trump administration's reckless policies for a moment -- not even when Mitch McConnell tried to silence her on the Senate floor for reading Coretta Scott King's letter.

* Kirsten Gillibrand, who led the charge in opposing Betsy DeVos and so many of Trump's disastrous Cabinet nominees.

* Claire McCaskill, who has held the GOP accountable every step of the way for failing to hold public hearings on their plans to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- and is being targeted by GOP ads for her efforts.

But just like Claire, our Democratic women's willingness to take on the tough fights has made them top targets in 2018.

In Michigan, Kid Rock is threatening to run against Debbie Stabenow. And in Wisconsin, Tammy Baldwin is already facing more than a million dollars in attack ads funded by a GOP mega-donor.

Nearly half of the women in the Senate face re-election next year, and if we want to keep them in Washington to fight for us, then we have to act now to give them the resources they'll need.

[**Chip in now to become a 2018 founding donor of the Women 's Senate Network and help build a community to support our women Senate candidates. And when you contribute $7 or more, you'll even get a "Nevertheless, She Persisted" magnet to thank you for your membership.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warren-wsn?refcode=DPE-20170720-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for supporting our Democratic women,

Mindy
**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbf3/2b07114c/3332ce4d/731107e9/3006321838/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbf3/2b07114c/3332ce4d/731107e8/3006321838/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954dbf3/2b07114c/3332ce4d/731107eb/3006321838/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: As many months as it takes to stop Trump >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6416/24c69fd9/c690b17a/1899c2d7/1778511377/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE723N_digital_email_20170720_6monthsResistTrump_inact&source=WQEFE723N_digital_email_20170720_6monthsResistTrump_inact")
---

Peter,

Six months.

That's how long Donald Trump has been president.

Five months and 30 days.

Thanks to the Women's March on Washington, that's how long we've been a part of the resistance to his toxic, xenophobic, homophobic, anti-woman, anti-family, and truly life-threatening policies.

**[We are as determined to stop Trump now as we were six months ago. Let's keep up the resistance: Donate $3 now to the Stop Trump Fund.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6416/24c69fd9/c690b17a/1899c2d0/1778511377/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170720_email_6Months?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+We+are+as+determined+to+stop+Trump+now+a&utm_campaign=WQEFE723N_digital_email_20170720_6monthsResistTrump_inact&source=WQEFE723N_digital_email_20170720_6monthsResistTrump_inact")**

As women across the country are fighting at the grassroots level, EMILY's List women have been leading the resistance in Congress against the Trump White House.

Senator Elizabeth Warren spoke out against the nomination of Jeff Sessions. And even after she was silenced, she persisted and refused to give up.

Senator Kamala Harris grilled Jeff Sessions for answers during his testimony before the Senate Intelligence Committee investigating Russian interference in the election.

Freshman Rep. Stephanie Murphy -- a national security specialist and Vietnamese refugee -- introduced a bill to remove Steve Bannon from the National Security Council and stood up to Donald Trump's discriminatory refugee orders.

And Rep. Pramila Jayapal introduced her first bill as a freshman in direct response to Trump's Muslim ban, guaranteeing that detained individuals trying to enter the United States have access to legal counsel.

Want to see more resistance in Congress like this for another six months? And another six months? And as many months as it takes?

**Donate $3 now to support pro-choice Democratic women who fight back against Trump's agenda every step of the way:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Keep-Resisting](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6416/24c69fd9/c690b17a/1899c2d1/1778511377/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170720_email_6Months?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgKeepResisting&utm_campaign=WQEFE723N_digital_email_20170720_6monthsResistTrump_inact&source=WQEFE723N_digital_email_20170720_6monthsResistTrump_inact")**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6416/24c69fd9/c690b17a/1899c2d2/1778511377/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170720_email_6Months?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE723N_digital_email_20170720_6monthsResistTrump_inact&source=WQEFE723N_digital_email_20170720_6monthsResistTrump_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---

clean_body: We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | "" Peter, Six months. That's how long Donald Trump has been president. Five months and 30 days. Thanks to the Women's March on Washington, that's how long we've been a part of the resistance to his toxic, xenophobic, homophobic, anti-woman, anti-family, and truly life-threatening policies. "" As women across the country are fighting at the grassroots level, EMILY's List women have been leading the resistance in Congress against the Trump White House. Senator Elizabeth Warren spoke out against the nomination of Jeff Sessions. And even after she was silenced, she persisted and refused to give up. Senator Kamala Harris grilled Jeff Sessions for answers during his testimony before the Senate Intelligence Committee investigating Russian interference in the election. Freshman Rep. Stephanie Murphy -- a national security specialist and Vietnamese refugee -- introduced a bill to remove Steve Bannon from the National Security Council and stood up to Donald Trump's discriminatory refugee orders. And Rep. Pramila Jayapal introduced her first bill as a freshman in direct response to Trump's Muslim ban, guaranteeing that detained individuals trying to enter the United States have access to legal counsel. Want to see more resistance in Congress like this for another six months? And another six months? And as many months as it takes? Donate $3 now to support pro-choice Democratic women who fight back against Trump's agenda every step of the way: "" Thank you, Stephanie Schriock President, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List.
